vocab.meaning: có một khoảng thời gian cực kỳ vui vẻ (nhờ quản lý thời gian tốt)
vocab.example: By keeping an eye on my watch and staying organized, I can finish my chores early and have a whale of a time with my friends.
Investing in a solid timepiece might seem expensive now, but in the long run, its durability and timeless style make it a wise choice.

vocab.meaning: hoàn thành việc gì đó trước khi hết giờ
vocab.example: I always wear a watch during exams because it's the only way I can effectively pace myself to beat the clock.

vocab.meaning: món quà thời gian (sự quý giá của việc quản lý thời gian)
vocab.example: A watch is more than an accessory; it represents the gift of time and the importance of not squandering our limited hours.
I prefer mechanical watches because they stand the test of time, unlike smartwatches that become obsolete in just a few years.
